query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: A digital weather station stands upright in front of a window, displaying outdoor temperature, indoor temperature, day, and humidity readings on its screen. The device features buttons labeled CHANNEL, CLK/SET, MAX/MIN, ALERT, A1/A2, and SNOOZE/LIGHT, with a circular dial in the center. Behind the unit, a table with a vase of flowers is visible through the glass, and part of a patterned fabric appears in the lower left foreground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A digital weather station stands upright in front of a window, displaying outdoor temperature, indoor temperature, day, and humidity readings on its screen, with buttons labeled CHANNEL, CLK/SET, MAX/MIN, ALERT, A1/A2, and SNOOZE/LIGHT, and a circular dial in the center. Behind the unit, a table with a vase of flowers is visible, and part of a patterned fabric appears in the lower left foreground. The entire scene is overwhelmed by an intense magenta color cast that shifts every surface into unnatural pink hues, while overexposed, blown-out highlights in the background and on the device face erase fine detail and create a washed-out, unsettling monochrome effect.
